ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., Active, Completed, Paused) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization run */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for the run (e.g., Grid Search, Random Search, Bayesian Optimization) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., Running, Completed, Failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was completed */,
  "status_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the run status */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the run fails */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated completion time of the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the run */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the run was executed (e.g., Development, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizer_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimizer configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing the detailed configuration of the optimizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimizer_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., Integer, Float, String) */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter range */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter range */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_tunable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is tunable (0 for not tunable, 1 for tunable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter during the run */,
  "optim_value" REAL /* Optimized value of the parameter */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the parameter value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convergence_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convergence status */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "convergence_status" TEXT /* Convergence status of the run (e.g., Converged, Not Converged) */,
  "convergence_details" TEXT /* Details of the convergence status */,
  "convergence_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used for convergence */,
  "convergence_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations taken to converge */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the convergence status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_convergence_status_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Loss, Accuracy) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., Training, Validation, Test) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Scientist, ML Engineer, Admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active (0 for inactive, 1 for active) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Project, Experiment, Optimization Run) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Create, Read, Update, Delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the platform */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., Owner, Collaborator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_users" (
  "experiment_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-user association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., Owner, Collaborator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_users_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
